creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
> P.S. BTW, anybody use GitLab on FreeBSD? I have an issue and want to ask somebody…
Tha mailing lists are your friend:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/eresources-mail.html
MAybe try freebsd-hackers or freebsd-current

The FreeBSD forums: https://forums.freebsd.org/ might also be a good choice.

HTH
